summary: Claim Processing feature tested successfully. All backend API endpoints and frontend E2E tests pass. AI integration (ICD-10 code extraction via Gemini 2.5 Flash) is working correctly.

test_results.frontend: 100% (12/12 claim processing tests passed, 4/4 campaign regression tests passed)

seed_data_creation: Test claim sessions created during testing (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Claim Processing feature is fully tested. Backend has 17 pytest tests covering session CRUD, chat/AI integration, code search, code management, and Excel export. Frontend has 12 E2E tests covering navigation, session creation, AI chat, code search, code add/remove, session history, and export button states. All tests use test user mukesh/mukesh123. Navigation to Claim Processing is via sidebar button (2nd button in .dashboard-sidebar). Login uses 'Continue' button not 'Sign in'.

features_tested.create_new_session: PASS - Sessions created successfully via both center button and header button
features_tested.send_chat_ai_extraction: PASS - AI extracts ICD-10 codes from text messages correctly
features_tested.icd10_code_search: PASS - Search returns matching codes for both code prefix and description
features_tested.update_codes: PASS - Add and remove codes working correctly via UI and API
features_tested.export_to_excel: PASS - Excel export generates valid .xlsx file with code data
